articles.title: Medical or a PR exercise? Why presidents get annual check-ups - BBC
articles.description: Every president in modern history - including Donald Trump this week - has taken an annual physical exam that is as much about messaging as it is about health.
articles.content: Trump's physical this year listed his "vital statistics", including height (75 inches, 191cm), weight (238 pounds, 108kg), resting heart rate (73 beats per minute), and blood pressure (105/71 mmHg).
